info.name: Social API - High Velocity Redis Backend
info.description: A collection of API requests to interact with the high-performance social backend, featuring Redis-based guardrails, virality scoring, and notification throttling.

item.name: Engagement: Add Comment (Subject to Redis Guardrails)
item.description: Attempts to add a comment. For Bot authors (ID 101+), this triggers atomic limit checks and cooldown locks.

item.name: Engagement: Like Post (Boost Virality)
item.description: Increments the post likes and triggers an atomic +20 boost to the post's virality score.

item.name: Analytics: Get Global Virality Score
item.description: Retrieves the real-time interaction score calculated by the Redis caching layer.
